name: Quick and Easy Meat Loaf
recipeIngredient: 10 3/4 oz Campbell's Cream of Mushroom Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together half the mushroom soup, all the ground beef, onion soup mix, bread crumbs, and egg.
2. Shape the meat mixture into an 8 x 4-inch loaf in a 12 x 8-inch baking pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 1 1/4 hours or until done. Remove and discard the drippings.
4. In a saucepan over medium heat, heat the remaining soup, water, and reserved drippings to boiling, stirring occasionally.
5. Thin the sauce with additional water if needed to reach desired consistency.
6. Spoon the sauce over the meat loaf.
7. Makes 8 servings.
SERVINGS SUGGESTION: Serve with broccoli, cauliflower, carrots, and small red potatoes. Simmer about 5 cups of your favorite vegetable combination in 1 can (10 1/4 oz.) Campbell's Condensed Chicken Broth and 1 soup can water.
